stemHtml: An aircraft is in the climb when the pilots receives an ACAS Resolution Advisory to descend. The pilot must follow the RA immediately because the ACAS system anticipates…

options.a: A response within 1 second from the other aircraft in the opposite direction to the RA issued to them.
options.b: A timely response from the other aircraft in the opposite direction to the RA issued to them.
options.c: Your response will be correct and within 1 second.
options.d: Your response will be correct and timely.
